chunks.title: Recall of Israel's History in Egypt and Wilderness
chunks.reason: A continuous speech recounting the rebellion of the fathers and children in the wilderness.

chunks.title: Condemnation and Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: An extended argument addressing current idolatry followed by a promise of future purification.

chunks.title: Oracle Against the Negev Forest
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic oracle concerning fire consuming the forest of the south.

chunks.title: Translator's Reaction
chunks.reason: A brief narrative conclusion describing Ezekiel's response to the people's skepticism.
